svg.aria-label: ReTree budget 16, 32, and 64 compared with DFlash
svg.text: DFlash reference vs ReTree with 16-, 32-, and 64-node trees.
Accepted length is measured from local block-size-16 runs.
Average speedup: DFlash 4.82x, ReTree-16 4.92x (+2.1%), ReTree-32 5.23x (+8.5%), ReTree-64 5.43x (+12.7%).
Average accepted length: DFlash 6.24, ReTree-16 7.25, ReTree-32 7.84, ReTree-64 8.29; ReTree-16 uses one quarter of the 64-node budget.
